name: Disk pressure high
triggers: disk usage exceeds warning or critical threshold
facts_to_gather: Loki or retention growth if applicable
classification_rules: if logs are growing rapidly then likely retention_or_verbosity_issue
if temp artifacts are growing then likely cleanup_or_retention_issue
if container overlay grows rapidly then likely image_or_runtime_issue
verification_checks: disk usage trend flattens or drops
no critical service remains at imminent risk
improvement_prompts: Should large artifact classes be isolated onto separate storage?
Should disk growth per path be monitored continuously?
